name: Lisas' Italian Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the ground beef, onion, garlic, Worcestershire sauce, eggs, oregano, and dried basil until well combined.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Mix in the evaporated milk, tomato sauce, corn flake crumbs, ricotta cheese, and 1/4 cup of parmesan cheese.
4. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
5. Place 1/3 of the meat mixture into an oiled baking dish.
6. Spread half of the ricotta mixture over the meat layer.
7. Repeat with another portion of the meat mixture and the remaining ricotta mixture.
8. Top with the remaining tomato sauce and sprinkle with the remaining parmesan cheese.
9. Bake for 45-60 minutes or until done, turning off heat when finished.
